A sample of 16 engineering students of a college was taken and the information was obtained on their starting salary. The monthly means starting salary was found to be ₹30,200 with the standard deviation of ₹960. The past data on the salary has given the mean value of ₹30,000. Using a 5% level of significance, can we conclude that the average starting salary is different from ₹30,000? Critical value at 5% level of significance and degree of freedom 15 is -2.131 and 2,131 5 2
